markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting between GrowthX (Marcel Santilli) and Hypermode (Hank Taylor) to discuss an SEO engagement for increasing organic traffic to Hypermode's product D-Graph.](https://fathom.video/share/DqLagYyrsk1AbbjfyrEWMauUXKcetzMe?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Main goal is to significantly increase organic traffic to D-Graph, aiming for 4-5x increase (16-20k monthly visitors) in 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/DqLagYyrsk1AbbjfyrEWMauUXKcetzMe?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [Will conduct customer interviews and research to deeply understand pain points, questions, and journey of data engineers (primary audience)](https://fathom.video/share/DqLagYyrsk1AbbjfyrEWMauUXKcetzMe?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
  - [GrowthX will build out a content workflow management system to efficiently create high-quality content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/DqLagYyrsk1AbbjfyrEWMauUXKcetzMe?tab=summary&timestamp=2700.0)
  - [Early focus on publishing content to start getting traction, with quality improvements over time](https://fathom.video/share/DqLagYyrsk1AbbjfyrEWMauUXKcetzMe?tab=summary&timestamp=3664.0)

## Topics

### Understanding Target Audience

  - [Primary audience is data engineers, architects - the technical users of D-Graph](https://fathom.video/share/DqLagYyrsk1AbbjfyrEWMauUXKcetzMe?tab=summary&timestamp=1670.0)
  - [Potential to also target technical founders/CTOs evaluating database options](https://fathom.video/share/DqLagYyrsk1AbbjfyrEWMauUXKcetzMe?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)
  - [Need to gather customer profiles, use cases, job roles from Hypermode to inform persona development](https://fathom.video/share/DqLagYyrsk1AbbjfyrEWMauUXKcetzMe?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)

### Current State and Goals

  - [D-Graph currently gets \~4k monthly organic visitors, \~1k branded searches](https://fathom.video/share/DqLagYyrsk1AbbjfyrEWMauUXKcetzMe?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)
  - [Competitor Neo4j gets \~122k monthly visitors, 36k from US](https://fathom.video/share/DqLagYyrsk1AbbjfyrEWMauUXKcetzMe?tab=summary&timestamp=1305.0)
  - [Goal is 4-5x increase in 6 months to 16-20k monthly visitors](https://fathom.video/share/DqLagYyrsk1AbbjfyrEWMauUXKcetzMe?tab=summary&timestamp=1163.0)
  - [Long-term success metrics TBD, but revenue growth to $2M by next June is a key company goal](https://fathom.video/share/DqLagYyrsk1AbbjfyrEWMauUXKcetzMe?tab=summary&timestamp=890.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [Focus on addressing real pains/questions data engineers have vs. just chasing keywords](https://fathom.video/share/DqLagYyrsk1AbbjfyrEWMauUXKcetzMe?tab=summary&timestamp=1793.0)
  - [Build out long-tail topics - use cases, industries, roles, pain points](https://fathom.video/share/DqLagYyrsk1AbbjfyrEWMauUXKcetzMe?tab=summary&timestamp=1793.0)
  - [Leverage AI writing assistance but ensure technical accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/DqLagYyrsk1AbbjfyrEWMauUXKcetzMe?tab=summary&timestamp=3089.0)
  - [Early publishing to get momentum, with iterations to improve quality](https://fathom.video/share/DqLagYyrsk1AbbjfyrEWMauUXKcetzMe?tab=summary&timestamp=3664.0)

### Next Steps

  - [Hank to provide sales materials, product docs, customer info to GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/DqLagYyrsk1AbbjfyrEWMauUXKcetzMe?tab=summary&timestamp=2570.0)
  - [Hank to conduct customer interviews for additional insights](https://fathom.video/share/DqLagYyrsk1AbbjfyrEWMauUXKcetzMe?tab=summary&timestamp=2222.0)
  - [Marcel to share interview question templates](https://fathom.video/share/DqLagYyrsk1AbbjfyrEWMauUXKcetzMe?tab=summary&timestamp=2242.0)
  - [Set up content workflow management system](https://fathom.video/share/DqLagYyrsk1AbbjfyrEWMauUXKcetzMe?tab=summary&timestamp=2700.0)
  - [Align on competitive research approach](https://fathom.video/share/DqLagYyrsk1AbbjfyrEWMauUXKcetzMe?tab=summary&timestamp=2582.0)
